Implement the following plan:

# Restore iCloud Sync

## Context
iCloud sync was disabled in commit `f23ef25` because a paid Apple Developer Program membership was required. The user has now registered, so the feature can be re-enabled. The implementation is fully complete — only the config plugin reference was removed.

## Changes

### 1. Add plugin back to `app.json`
Add `"./modules/icloud-sync/app.plugin.js"` to the `plugins` array (after `expo-build-properties`).

### 2. Remove TODO comment from `modules/icloud-sync/app.plugin.js`
Remove lines 6-8 (the TODO comment about re-enabling).

### 3. Regenerate native project
Run `npx expo prebuild --clean` to regenerate iOS native code with iCloud entitlements injected.

## Verification
- Check `ios/fasola/fasola.entitlements` contains `com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers` with `iCloud.com.erykpiast.fasola`
- Check `ios/fasola/Info.plist` contains `NSUbiquitousContainers`
- Build and run on device to confirm iCloud container access


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/eryk.napierala/.claude/projects/-Users-eryk-napierala-Projects-fasola/2d3c4078-16af-4cd8-bfae-28dca8c5253f.jsonl

planContent:
# Restore iCloud Sync

## Context
iCloud sync was disabled in commit `f23ef25` because a paid Apple Developer Program membership was required. The user has now registered, so the feature can be re-enabled. The implementation is fully complete — only the config plugin reference was removed.

## Changes

### 1. Add plugin back to `app.json`
Add `"./modules/icloud-sync/app.plugin.js"` to the `plugins` array (after `expo-build-properties`).

### 2. Remove TODO comment from `modules/icloud-sync/app.plugin.js`
Remove lines 6-8 (the TODO comment about re-enabling).

### 3. Regenerate native project
Run `npx expo prebuild --clean` to regenerate iOS native code with iCloud entitlements injected.

## Verification
- Check `ios/fasola/fasola.entitlements` contains `com.apple.developer.icloud-container-identifiers` with `iCloud.com.erykpiast.fasola`
- Check `ios/fasola/Info.plist` contains `NSUbiquitousContainers`
- Build and run on device to confirm iCloud container access
